overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a Mediterranean coastal salt flat settlement with historic stone architecture, featuring a windmill, pink salt evaporation ponds, and workers harvesting salt. The character walks through open yards, covered stone archways, and across wooden walkways in bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open salt works yard with stone walls and wooden structures

events.description: passing by NPC workers handling white salt piles near stone walls
character turns slightly left approaching the windmill structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the salt works yard, approaching the windmill and passing workers

notable_agents.action: worker shoveling salt into piles near the stone wall
worker standing near large white salt mounds

entered.detail: wooden cart with canvas cover and leather straps
rough-hewn stone barrier with wooden posts
traditional stone windmill with white canvas sails
large mounds of harvested white salt

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a covered cart in an open salt works yard, walking past stone walls and wooden structures. Workers are visible handling salt piles as the character approaches a traditional windmill in the distance under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path along salt evaporation ponds with wooden fence

events.description: approaching the stone archway building with pointed arches
entering the shadowed interior of the stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the salt flat perimeter toward the covered stone archway entrance

entered.detail: historic stone structure with large pointed arch entrance
simple wooden railing along the salt flat edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, with pink salt flats visible to the left. The stone archway building grows larger ahead as the character approaches and enters the shadowed threshold.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with wooden ceiling beams and arched openings

events.description: fully entering the covered stone archway with wooden ceiling
exiting the archway back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone corridor, passing storage barrels and fishing nets before emerging back outside

entered.detail: stacked wooden storage barrels along the wall
large terracotta jars and pots near the wall
nets hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: Inside the stone archway, the character walks through a shadowed corridor with wooden ceiling beams, passing barrels and pottery. The space opens ahead to bright sunlight as the character exits back to the open salt flats.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt evaporation ponds with pink water and wooden walkways

events.description: stepping onto wooden planks over the pink salt water
passing a worker raking salt in the shallow pink water

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across wooden planks over the pink salt water, observing workers harvesting salt in the evaporation ponds

notable_agents.action: worker raking salt in the pink water wearing a wide-brimmed hat
distant worker standing in the salt pond grid

entered.detail: shallow pools of pink salt water divided by stone walls
narrow wooden walkway boards crossing the water
harvested salt piled in white pyramids

segments.scene_description: The character walks across wooden planks suspended over the striking pink salt water of the evaporation ponds. Workers are visible harvesting salt in the shallow pools, with white salt mounds lining the edges and the windmill visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open salt works yard through a shadowed stone corridor and out onto vibrant pink evaporation ponds. It begins near a covered cart and stone walls, moving past workers handling salt piles toward a traditional windmill under the bright midday sun. As the camera follows a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, the view opens to pink salt flats before the scene shifts into the cool shade of a stone archway building. The camera then glides through a shadowed corridor lined with barrels and pottery under wooden beams, before emerging back into the brilliant light. Finally, the movement carries the character across wooden planks suspended over striking pink waters where workers harvest salt amidst white mounds, with the windmill remaining a distant landmark.
